description:
Open the T8 housing bracket CAD model at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd and determine the bounding box dimensions (X, Y, Z), total volume, total surface area, and center of mass coordinates (X, Y, Z) for the main solid body. Save a report with these values rounded to 2 decimal places to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/measurement_report.txt using the following format:

BoundingBox_X: <value>
BoundingBox_Y: <value>
BoundingBox_Z: <value>
Volume: <value>
SurfaceArea: <value>
CenterOfMass_X: <value>
CenterOfMass_Y: <value>
CenterOfMass_Z: <value>
